name: bpmct
css: .bpmct-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1a0a00; overflow: hidden; } .bpmct-text { font-family: Impact, 'Arial Black', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 10vw, 5rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #ff6a00; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ff6a00, 0 0 30px #ff8c00, 0 0 60px #ffa500, 0 0 100px #ff4500; animation: bpmct-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0% { color: #ff4500; text-shadow: 0 0 10px #ff4500, 0 0 30px #ff6a00, 0 0 60px #ff8c00; } 50% { color: #ffa500; text-shadow: 0 0 20px #ffa500, 0 0 50px #ff8c00, 0 0 90px #ff6a00, 0 0 140px #ff4500; } 100% { color: #ffcc00; text-shadow: 0 0 15px #ffcc00, 0 0 40px #ffa500, 0 0 80px #ff6a00, 0 0 120px #ff4500; } }
